$sessionId..read: auth != null && (data.child('callerId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('receiverId').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('callerId').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('receiverId').val() == auth.uid)
$sessionId..write: auth != null && (data.child('callerId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('receiverId').val() == auth.uid || !data.exists() || newData.child('callerId').val() == auth.uid)
